title: Checkout Text Messaging Consent Audit Bug
summary: Fixing a bug where the audit system incorrectly flags text messaging consent as missing when it's already enabled, and fixing platform-specific documentation links.
hypothesis: By fixing the backend logic that incorrectly triggers the text messaging consent audit item and correcting platform-specific documentation links, we expect to reduce false positive audit flags by 100% and improve merchant trust in the audit system.
notes: Account KA: SL8TeH is experiencing this issue. Customer is using BigCommerce but receiving Shopify documentation links. Requires backend fix and JIRA ticket creation.
control_description: Current system incorrectly shows 'Text messaging consent is not being collected at checkout' audit item even when consent collection is enabled, and shows Shopify documentation to BigCommerce users
treatment_description: Fixed backend logic that correctly detects enabled text messaging consent collection and displays platform-appropriate documentation links based on merchant's actual platform
